PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-17-2026 Granted Per Written Order
TENTATIVE RULING: Matter will be called to admit will. No appearance is required. Status hearing on close of estate will be set for 12/20/27.
